title: Implement Phase 3: ferrum-strings, ferrum-ma, ferrum-stride-tricks, ferrum-numpy-interop

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Phase 3 coordinator plan: Launch 4 parallel agents for strings, ma, stride-tricks, numpy-interop. All simpler than Phase 2 crates. Python dev headers installed (Python 3.13, numpy 2.3.5, pyarrow 23.0.1, polars 1.38.1). ferrum-numpy-interop uses feature flags (python, arrow) — will need polars added to Cargo.toml.
